features: Glow boosting water-based serum helps provide essential Vitamins to feed dull, dry & tired skin
Antioxidant-rich Acai Berry Extracts and Niacinamide
description: Product Description Level up your skincare routine with our Step 2 Superberry Radiance Serum. Serum application is important to target specific skin concerns and improve the absorption of key ingredients. Our water-based formula should be used twice daily to achieve a super glowy, luminous complexion. Raspberry, Blueberry, Cranberry and Acai Berry help provide essential vitamins and antioxidants to feed dull, dry and tired skin. Vegan Friendly. Ingredients Water (Aqua), Butylene Glycol, Glycereth-26, Betaine, Rubus Idaeus (Raspberry) Fruit Extract, Vaccinium Angustifolium (Blueberry) Fruit, Vaccinium Macrocarpon (Cranberry) Fruit Extract, Rubus Chamaemorus (Cloudberry) Seed Extract, Lycium Chinense (Goji Berry) Fruit Extract, Euterpe Oleracea (Acai Berry) Fruit Extract, Sapindus Mukorossi Fruit Extract, Coffea Arabica (Coffee) Seed Extract, Callicarpa Japonica Fruit Extract, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil, Lavandula (Lavender) Hybrida Oil, Yeast Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin, 1,2-Hexanediol, Niacinamide, Hydroxyacetophenone, Ammonium Acryloyldimethyltaurate/Beheneth-25 Methacrylate Crosspolymer, 2-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Sorbeth-30, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Hydrolyzed Sclerotium Gum, Propylene Glycol, Pentylene Glycol, Phenoxyethanol, Biosaccharide Gum-1, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate, Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Hydrolyzed Sodium Hyaluronate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Linalool, Limonene. Directions Always apply serum to freshly cleansed skin. Apply 1-2 drops of the serum in to your hands before pressing gently in to your face and neck. Use AM + PM, followed by our Step 3 Eye Gel Cream. See more
